data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding Q&A and poll response linkage.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for Q&A and poll response linkage to attendees/sessions. However, the evidence provided does not include any details or endpoints related to capturing live engagement events such as Q&A submissions or poll responses. This lack of critical functionality indicates that the validation cannot be conclusively performed, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of capturing live engagement events such as Q&A or polls.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
